maplibre.CooperativeGesturesHandler.WindowsHelpTe: Use Ctrl + scroll to zoom the map
maplibre.CooperativeGesturesHandler.MacHelpText: Use ⌘ + scroll to zoom the map
maplibre.CooperativeGesturesHandler.MobileHelpTex: Use two fingers to move the map

waypointDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this waypoint from the node and the client?
waypointDetail.deleteSuccessDescription: The waypoint was removed from the selected channel.
waypointDetail.deleteErrorDescription: Check the connection and try again.

waypointDialog.title: Drop Waypoint
waypointDialog.description: Create a waypoint at the selected map location.
waypointDialog.editDescription: Update this waypoint and resend it to the selected channel.

geofence.label: Geofence
geofence.description: Optionally add a circular or boxed fence around this waypoint.

box.toggleDescription: Center a box on this waypoint.

alerts.enterDescription: Raise an alert when a node enters the fence.
alerts.exitDescription: Raise an alert when a node leaves the fence.
alerts.favoritesDescription: Limit fence alerts to favorite nodes.

lockToNode.label: Lock to my node
lockToNode.description: Only your node will be allowed to update this waypoint.
lockToNode.unavailable: Unavailable until the connected node identity is known.

success.title: Waypoint created
success.description: The waypoint was sent to the selected channel.
success.updatedDescription: The waypoint changes were sent to the selected channel.

error.title: Waypoint could not be created
error.description: Check the connection and try again.
error.updatedDescription: Check the connection and try again.

validation.invalidExpiry: Waypoint expiry must be a valid date and time
validation.invalidGeofenceRadius: Enter a circle radius using whole {{unit}}
validation.invalidGeofenceBox: Enter both box width and height using whole {{unit}}
validation.geofenceRequiredForAlerts: Add a geofence radius or box before enabling alerts
